Close the lid and set to sealing. Cook on manual high pressure for 40 minutes. Once the cooking time is up, allow the pressure to release naturally for 10 minutes, then do a quick release. Remove the meat from the instant pot and shred. Stir in the remaining cup of bbq sauce and serve on buns as desired. Billy&rsquo;s Notes: Heather made this one, and it was great! She didn&rsquo;t use hot sauce and only 1/2 cup of the BBQ sauce at the end (that last step).
Credit for this recipe goes to The Salty Marshmallow:
Instant Pot Pulled PorkInstant Pot Pulled Pork is seasoned to perfection, and mouthwateringly tender! Make this easy and super flavorful pulled pork using a pork loin roast and have your family&rsquo;s new favorite instant pot pork recipe on …
description: Tender, juicy hearty pork with packed brown sugar and paprika — caramelized edges, unbelievable flavor, and the kind of aroma that makes the neighbors jealous.
title: Instant Pot Pulled Pork

content: Ingredients 2 tsp Olive Oil 1 Tbsp Butter 1 small Onion, diced 1 Bay Leaf 1 cup Carrots, chopped (about 2 or 3 carrots) 1 cup Celery, chopped (2 stalks) 3 large cloves Garlic, pressed or minced (about 1 Tbsp) 1 tsp Salt (more to taste) 1/2 tsp Pepper 1/4 tsp Poultry Seasoning 1/2 tsp Sage, dried 4 sprigs Fresh Thyme, 2 tsp leaves (or 1/2 tsp dried) 1 2&quot; sprig Fresh Rosemary, 1 tsp leaves, stripped off and minced (or 1 tsp dried &amp; crushed) 4 cups Chicken Broth, low sodium 1 large Potato, chopped 1 1/2 lbs Chicken Thighs, and/or Breasts, cut in slightly larger than bite sized pieces 1 cup Frozen Peas (or mixed vegetables) 1/2 cup Heavy Cream Box of Bisquick Instructions Turn the pressure cooker on to the Sauté setting. When the pot is hot, add the olive oil and the butter. Then add the onion and bay leaf. Stir. Add the carrot, celery, and garlic. Cook for a few minutes, scraping the bottom of the pot to get up any brown bits (deglaze). Add the salt, pepper, poultry seasoning, sage, thyme, and rosemary. Cook for a few seconds to let the spices become fragrant. Add the chicken broth. Put a glass lid on the pot and let the contents warm up to barely a simmer. Add the potato and chicken and stir. Add the dumplings. Make them according to the Bisquick package and then drop heaping teaspoonfulls into the broth (not too large as they need to cook through, and they expand). Cancel the Sauté function. Place the lid on the pot and lock in place. Turn the steam release knob to the sealing position. Press the Pressure Cook/Manual button (or dial) and then the + or - button (or dial) to select 7 minutes. When the cooking cycle has finished, do a Controlled Quick Release of the steam/pressure. Start by using a wooden spoon or other long handled utensil to turn the steam release knob towards Venting, and start letting the steam out gradually. Do this several times, and back off if any of the sauce starts to spew out with the steam. Then open it all the way when you feel …
description: Juicy, flavorful savory chicken with olive oil and small onion — golden on the outside, tender all the way through. The kind of dinner that earns a round of applause.
title: Instant Pot Chicken and Dumplings

content:
Ingredients 2 tablespoons of coconut oil 1/2 cup of onion (yellow, white or even a few shallots would work best), chopped 1.5 – 2 teaspoons of minced garlic 3 strips of bacon, chopped 1 lbs of Brussels spouts, outer leaves removed and cleaned (leave whole) 1/2 cup water Salt and Pepper to Taste Butter, optional Instructions Turn your Instant Pot on Sauté Add your coconut oil to the pot Add your chopped onion and minced garlic and sauté for a minute Add in your chopped bacon Sauté until your onions are translucent and bacon crisps up Add your prepared, whole Brussels Sprouts with a 1/2 of water Salt and Pepper to Taste Give it a quick stir to incorporate everything Put on your lid, making sure that your vent is closed Set on Manual for 3 minutes on LOW PRESSURE Once cooking is completed (listen for that beep) do a quick release Open your lid when ready and drop in a bit of butter and stir (optional) Drain out the liquid Plate those bad boys up and try not to eat them all folks! Billy&rsquo;s Notes: Alright, really important. Where it uses coconut oil, use something else!! These were good, but totally tasted like coconut. I love coconut. I love brussels sprouts. But not sure if the two mesh very well. I&rsquo;m going to use butter or even just olive oil for that part next time.
Credit for this recipe goes to The Imperfectly Happy Home:
Instant Pot Brussels Sprouts in 3 Minutes - Fast &amp; DeliciousInstant Pot Brussels Sprouts in 3 minutes. If you like Brussels sprouts then you know how long it can take to roast these bad boys for a meal!
description: Fall-apart tender satisfying deliciousness with of coconut oil and of onion that the Instant Pot delivers in record time. One pot, one timer, one incredible meal.
title: Instant Pot Brussels Sprouts

content:
Ingredients Prep Time
1 minute
Cook Time
5 minutes
Servings
1-6 eggs
INGREDIENTS
1-6 XL Fresh Egg chilled (from the refrigerator) INSTRUCTIONS
Instructions Fill the Instant Pot with one cup of cold water. Add the steamer basket, or trivet and steamer basket, egg stand (if using) and eggs. Close and lock the lid of the pressure cooker. Cook for 5 minutes at low pressure (if your pressure cooker does not have this setting, try do a test egg at the pressure cooker setting it has. When time is up, open the pressure cooker with the Normal release - release pressure through the valve. Open the pressure cooker and place the egg(s) in a container filled with cold water. Keep the water cool by bringing the container to the sink and running more cold water into the container for 1 more minute, to serve warm, or 3 minutes to cool down completely. Tap the two ends and the middle of the egg and peel delicately. Billys Note:Tracey showed us an easy way to remember and do hard-boiled eggs in the IP. The 5-5-5 method. So just a cup of water, like the recipe above, in the Instant Pot. Then 5 mins on high. Then 5 mins natural release. Then 5 mins in cold water or an ice bath. Did them like this and they were perfect and easy to peel.
description: Tender, flavorful hearty magic with xl fresh egg chilled — pressure-cooked to absolute perfection in a fraction of the usual time. Weeknight dinners have never been this good.
title: Hard Boiled Eggs

content:
Ingredients 1 poundDried Navy Beans
1 TablespoonKosher Salt(to add to the soak water)
3 cups Water for soaking
6-8 slices Thick Bacon roughly chopped
1 medium Onion roughly chopped
3 1/4 cups Fresh Water
1/4 cupMaple Syrup(the real stuff)
1/3 cupMolasses
1/4 cupLight Brown Sugar(packed)
1/3 cupHeinz Ketchup
1 TablespoonWorcestershire Sauce(secret ingredient, shhh)
1 1/4 teaspoonsDry Mustard Powder
1/2 teaspoonSea Salt
1/4 teaspoonFreshly Ground Black Pepper
Instructions
Instructions Rinse and sort beans, removing any debris. Add beans and salt to a bowl and cover with water, two inches above beans. Soak for three hours. Drain beans and rinse. Select the Sauté or Browning function on Pressure Cooker and allow to heat. Add bacon and onions to the Pressure Cooker cooking pot and cook until bacon begins to render, scraping brown bits from bottom of cooking pot. Add 1/4 cup of water and continue cooking until water has evaporated, bacon fat is rendered and onions are semi-soft. Add beans, water, Maple Syrup, Molasses, Ketchup, Brown Sugar, Worcestershire Sauce, Mustard, Pepper to the cooking pot and stir to combine. Lock on lid and close Pressure Valve. Cook at High Pressure for 75-80 minutes. When Beep is heard, allow a 15 minute Natural Pressure Release and then open Pressure Valve to remove remaining Pressure. Discard any floating beans. Add the salt. Taste a couple of beans for tenderness and sweetness and add more Molasses, if a sweeter taste is desired. If Beans are still hard, cook for another 15 minutes. Select the Sauté or Browning function and cook until desired consistency. Recipe Notes
If your beans are not super fresh, you may have to cook them longer.
If you have no time to soak, add 15 minutes to the cook time.
These are GREAT! Maybe my favorite homemade beans. I&rsquo;d give them a 5 out of 5.
Here&rsquo;s the actual website for this recipe. Credit to This Old Gal:
Pressure Cooker Holiday Baked BeansPressure Cooker Holiday Baked Beans are delicious any …
description: Warm, satisfying comforting casserole with pounddried navy beans and tablespoonkosher salt that feeds a crowd and tastes even better the next day. The definition of comfort food.
title: Holiday Baked Beans

content:
Ingredients Ingredients 5-6 Large Potatoes Peeled and cubed You can use more or less with the same cooking time 1 cup chicken broth 3 cloves garlic 1 sprig rosemary 2 tbs butter 1/4 cup milk Instructions Instructions Place cubed potatoes in the Instant pot with chicken broth whole cloves of garlic, rosemary sprig, and butter. Place IP on manual high pressure for 15 minutes. Do a quick release. Drain Potatoes if needed and add milk and butter Mash until creamy and smooth. I use my kitchen aid mixer or a handheld masher. Here is a link to the actual website. Credit Adventures of a Nurse:
Garlic and Rosemary Instant Pot Mashed PotatoesInstant Pot Garlic and Rosemary Mashed Potatoes turn out creamy and no lumps at all every single time in the Instant Pot.
description: Rich, buttery robust potatoes loaded with large potatoes peeled and cubed you can use more or less with the same cooking time, chicken broth, and cloves garlic. Comfort food doesn't get much more comforting than this.
title: Garlic and Rosemary Mashed Potatoes

content:
Ingredients On Rack
4 Ears Corn on the Cob (or more) 1 cup Water In Pot
4 Ears Corn on the Cob (or more) 1 cup Water 1/2 cup Milk 1 TablespoonSugar 2 Tablespoons Butter 1 teaspoonSea Salt Instructions
On Rack
Instructions Add one cup of water to the Pressure Cooker cooking pot and place a trivet on top. Lay corn on trivet. Lock on lid and close Pressure Valve. Cook on Steam (High Pressure) for 1 minutes. If frozen, cook for 0-1 minute. After 5 minutes, do a Quick Release. In Pot for Butter Flavor
Add corn, water, milk, sugar, salt and butter to Pressure Cooker cooking pot. Lock on lid and close Pressure Valve. Cook on High Pressure for 1 minute. If frozen, cook for 0-1 minute. Allow a Natural Pressure Release. The longer the corn sits in the liquid, the more flavor is infused. Here is a link to the actual website. Credit to This Old Gal:
Instant Pot Pressure Cooker Corn on the CobInstant Pot Pressure Cooker Corn on the Cob can be made on a steamer rack, or in the pot with butter, milk and salt, for a buttery infused flavor.
description: Savory, colorful crisp vegetables with ears corn on the cob and ears corn on the cob — proof that the humble veggie side can absolutely steal the show.
title: Corn on the Cob

content:
Ingredients Ingredients 1 1/3 pound chicken wings about 12 wings 4 tbs taco seasoning 1 1/2 tsp smoked salt Instructions Instructions In a shallow dish mix the spices together Roll each wing in the spices gently, the spice don&rsquo;t need to cover the whole wing In your instapot- add 1 cup of water Add a steamer basket to the bottom of your instapot Add your wings to the steamer basket. They can touch but should not be on top of each other. Instead I turned my on their ends to fit the 12 Close and lock the lid. Make sure the pot is set to sealing. Hit Manual and set for 10 minutes at high pressure. When the pot has cooked for 10 minutes at high pressure, carefully with a pan holder or some hand protection vent the pot. Once the pot has come back to regular pressure open the lid and remove the wings to a baking sheet. Broil wings for 10 minutes for crispy skin. Enjoy! Here&rsquo;s a link to the actual website. Credit to A Real Food Journey:
Instant Pot Chicken Wings - Instapot Recipe! - A Real Food JourneyLearn how to make chicken wings in an instapot! These Instant Pot Chicken wings took a 4 hour recipe and did all the work in 30 minutes!
description: Juicy, flavorful robust chicken with chicken wings about 12 wings and tbs taco seasoning — golden on the outside, tender all the way through. The kind of dinner that earns a round of applause.
title: Chicken Wings

content:
Ingredients 2 tbspolive oil 2chicken breasts, diced 4 clovesgarlic minced(or 2-3 tsp of minced garlic) 3 tbsplow-sodium soy sauce or tamari 1/2 cupjarred pad thai sauce (I like Thai Kitchen brand) 1 1/2 cupswater 1/2 packagerice noodles 1 cupCarrot matchsticks 1/2 eachred and yellow pepper, sliced(We replaced these with a bunch of bean sprouts instead) 4green onions, sliced 1/3 cupchopped peanuts(We omitted these for obvious reasons - allergies aplenty!) 1/3 cupfresh chopped cilantro NOTE: We made a few changes to the original recipe.
Instructions Add olive oil, chicken, garlic, soy sauce, pad thai sauce, water and rice noodles to Instant Pot in that order, leaving noodles floating slightly above other ingredients. Set to manual and pressure cook on high for 2 minutes. Instant Pot will take about 10 minutes to pre-heat and then 2 minutes to cook. When complete, press cancel and do a quick release of the steam, waiting until the pressure gauge drops back down and the lid is safe to open. Add carrot matchsticks, bell peppers and half of peanuts, tossing carefully with tongs. Place lid back on and let sit for 5 minutes. Remove lid and serve, then top with green onions, remaining chopped peanuts and cilantro. Enjoy! Credit for this recipe goes to TheGirlOnBloor.com. Here is a link to the actual page:
Instant Pot Chicken Pad Thai - The Girl on BloorThis Instant Pot Chicken Pad Thai is a super quick and easy one pot pad thai recipe that is perfect for your weekly meal prep - the noodles cook in the pot along with the other ingredients for minimal clean up too!
description: Crispy-skinned, bold chicken with tbspolive oil and chicken breasts cooked until golden and irresistible. This is the recipe that makes chicken exciting again.
title: Chicken Pad Thai

content:
Ingredients 1 and 1/4 cups long grain white rice 2 cups unsalted chicken broth 1 tsp. salt 1/2 tsp. pepper 4 (6-8 ounces each) individually-frozen, boneless, skinless chicken breasts 2 tsp. Italian herb blend, or your favorite dried herb blend 5 -6 large carrots, peeled and cut into 1” pieces Instructions Measure rice into bottom of the Instant Pot. Add chicken broth and salt and pepper, stir to combine. Lay the frozen chicken breasts on top of the rice. Season the chicken breasts with the Italian herb blend or your favorite herb blend. Lay carrots on top of the rice. Cover pot, lock on the lid, and set the steam release valve toSealing SelectPressure Cookand set to 10 minutes. When the cooking cycle has finished, allow the pot to sit for 5 minutes, and then do a quick release by moving the valve toVenting. NOTES You can make this recipe with fresh chicken breasts as well. Set the cooking time to 7 minutes. Allow the pot to sit for 5 minutes, and then do a quick release by moving the valve toVenting.
Credit for this recipe goes to Cook The Story:
Instant Pot Meal – Chicken Breasts from Frozen with Rice &amp; CarrotsIf you need a fast, Instant Pot dinner in less than 30 minutes, you can have an entire meal with tender chicken breasts, creamy risotto-like rice, and sweet carrots.
description: Juicy, flavorful comforting chicken with and 1/4 cups long grain white rice and unsalted chicken broth — golden on the outside, tender all the way through. The kind of dinner that earns a round of applause.
title: Chicken (from frozen), Rice, and Carrots

content:
Ingredients 2 Tbsp Butter 1½ - 2 Pounds Boneless Skinless Chicken Breast cut into cubes 2 Cloves Garlic 1 Small Onion 1 Tsp Salt 3/4 Tsp Pepper 1 Tsp Garlic Powder 1 and 1/3 Cups Long Grain Rice 1 and 1/3 Cups Chicken Broth ½ Cup Milk 1½ Tbsp Flour 1-2 Cups Fresh Broccoli cooked 1 and 1/2 - 2 Cups Mild Shredded Cheddar Cheese Instructions
Instructions Turn Instant Pot onto saute. Add butter and heat until hot. When hot, add chicken, onion, and garlic. Cook chicken mixture until onion starts to get translucent. Add rice, broth and seasonings. Stir well. Whisk together milk and flour and set aside. Cook on manual high pressure for 5 minutes. When the timer is up perform a quick release. Immediately add milk and flour mixture and mix until it is well combined. Add broccoli and cheese and stir until well combined. Serve immediately. Here is a link to the actual website. Credit to I Don&rsquo;t Have Time for That:
Instant Pot Chicken Broccoli and RiceInstant Pot Chicken Broccoli and Rice is the perfect solution for a busy week night dinner! In 5 minutes you can have a delicious home cooked meal!
description: Crispy-skinned, bold chicken with ½ - 2 pounds boneless skinless chicken breast cut into cubes and cloves garlic cooked until golden and irresistible. This is the recipe that makes chicken exciting again.
title: Chicken Broccoli and Rice

content:
Ingredients Ingredients 1 Tablespoon oil (I use avocado, but you can use coconut or canola - something with a high smoke point is best!) 3 boneless, skinless chicken breasts (uncooked) 1/4 teaspoon garlic salt per chicken breast (or you can use just garlic powder and regular salt) dash black pepper 1/8 teaspoon dried oregano 1/8 teaspoon dried basil 1 cup water Instructions Instructions Preheat the sauté function on the Instant Pot at the highest setting, and add oil to the pot. Season one side of the chicken breasts. After the display reads &ldquo;hot,&rdquo; carefully add the chicken breasts, seasoned side down, to the pot. I use tongs to avoid hot oil splatter. Add seasoning on the second side. Cook about 3 to 4 minutes on each side, and remove from pot with the tongs. Add 1 cup water to the pot (may need more for 8 quart pots), plus the trivet. Place the chicken on the trivet. Lock the lid, and cook on manual high for 5 minutes. Allow the chicken to naturally release for 5 minutes, and then quick release the rest. Remove the chicken from the pot, and allow to rest for about 5 minutes before serving for maximum juiciness. Here is a link to the actual website. Credit to A Pinch of Healthy:
Instant Pot Chicken Breasts (+ Video Tutorial) - A Pinch of HealthyThis is my tried and true method for making Instant Pot chicken breasts that are tender, juicy and delicious! For fresh (not frozen) chicken breasts.Instant Pot Chicken Breasts (+ Video Tutorial) - A Pinch of HealthyThis is my tried and true method for making Instant Pot chicken breasts that are tender, juicy and delicious! For fresh (not frozen) chicken breasts.
description: Juicy, flavorful robust chicken with boneless and garlic salt per chicken breast — golden on the outside, tender all the way through. The kind of dinner that earns a round of applause.
title: Chicken Breasts

content:
Ingredients 1 1/2 - 2 pounds beef chuck roast , trimmed and cut into 1 - 2 inch chunks (OR beef stew meat if you can&rsquo;t find chuck roast) 1 -2 teaspoons sea salt 1/2 teaspoon black pepper 1/2 teaspoon onion powder 2 1/2 teaspoonItalian seasoning, divided 1/3 cup flour , use gluten free flour or arrowroot starch if needed (leave out for keto) cooking oil 1 medium onion , cut into large chunks 3-4 cloves garlic , minced 6 Tablespoonstomato paste 2 Tablespoons balsamic vinegar or red wine 4 medium Yukon potatoes , peeled and chopped into 1 inch chunks (sub with cauliflower for low carb / keto) 1 large sweet potato peeled and chopped into 1 inch chunks (swap with pumpkin for low carb / keto) 3 medium carrots , peeled and cut into slices (leave out for low carb / keto) 2 ribs celery chopped 1-2 teaspoonsWorcestershire sauce 1 bay leaf 4-5 cupsbeef broth, homemade or low sodium water as needed to cover the vegetables 1-2 Tablespoons fresh chopped parsley for garnish 1/2star anise, optional but adds SO much depth and flavor salt and pepper to taste TO THICKEN STEW (OPTIONAL):
Make a slurry with 2 Tablespoons cornstarch or flour , all purpose, gluten free or arrowroot powder+ 3 tablespoons cool water Instant Pot, I have the 6 Quart DUO PLUS Instructions In a large zip-top bag, combine flour, salt, pepper, onion powder, and 1/2 teaspoonItalian seasoning. Add meat and shake until well coated. Browning the meat: (feel free to skip to step 5 and add all the ingredients together instead). Set the Instant Pot to SAUTE, add cooking oil and brown the meat on all sides. Meat will not be cooked through. (Be sure not to crowd the pot - you may have to work in batches). Transfer browned meat onto a large plate. Place the pot back in the pressure cooker and add onions and garlic and sauté for a minute or two then add the balsamic vinegar and tomato paste until just hot enough to deglaze the pot, about 1 minute. Add the beef back into the pot along with potatoes, sweet potato, …
description: Stick-to-your-ribs robust stew with beef chuck roast and sea salt — the kind of meal that turns a cold evening into something worth looking forward to.
title: Beef Stew 2

content:
INGREDIENTS: 1 tablespoon butter 1 cup steel cut oats 4 cups water 1 cup grated carrots 3 tablespoons maple syrup 2 teaspoons cinnamon 1 teaspoon pumpkin pie spice 1/4 teaspoon salt 3/4 cup raisins 1/4 cup chia seeds DIRECTIONS: Add butter to pressure cooking pot, select Sauté. When butter is melted add the oats and toast, stirring constantly, until they smell nutty, about 3 minutes.
Add water, carrots, maple syrup, cinnamon, pumpkin pie spice, and salt. Select high pressure and set 10 minutes cook time.
When beep sounds, turn off pressure cooker and use a natural pressure release for 10 minutes and then do a quick pressure release to release any remaining pressure. When valve drops carefully remove lid.
Stir oats. Stir in raisins and chia seeds. Cover and let sit five or 10 minutes until oats are desired thickness.
Top with additional raisins, maple syrup, chopped nuts, and milk.
Notes:
Ingredients Seemed a little bit bland, but I guess all oatmeal kind of is. Definitely tasted like carrot cake. I wound up throwing a tsp of brown sugar in my bowl of it and a little shot of milk. That made it better. Rating - 3 out of 5 Instructions Here&rsquo;s the actual website for this recipe. Credit to Taste of Home!
Pressure Cooker Carrot Cake Oatmeal
description: This decadent cake with steel cut oats and grated carrots is the one people request by name. Tender, flavorful, and gorgeous enough for a celebration (or just a really good Tuesday).
title: Carrot Cake Oatmeal

content:
Ingredients Prep Time
10 minutes
Cook Time
60 minutes
Servings
6-8 servings
INGREDIENTS
2 pounds beef stew meat Stew Seasoning of your choice, amount adjusted for 2 pounds of meat, McCormick Stew seasoning was used as seasoning by original creator of this recipe, two packets were used. 4 cups Water 5 potatoes chopped 1 cup carrot chopped 1 onion chopped 4 stalks celery chopped 1 cup green beans raw INSTRUCTIONS
Instructions Add first three ingredients to Instant Pot, secure lid and put valve into secure pressure setting. Select Manual and adjust to high pressure. Adjust cooking time for 45 minutes - 45 minutes provides extremely tender meat. After the cycle is complete allow to rest for 10-minutes before quick releasing pressure manually with valve. Remove lid and stir. Add vegetables, ensuring you stay below the maximum fill line. Put the lid back on and secure the valve to pressure. Select manual again, and set time between 5 and 15 minutes. Selecting 15-minutes results in really tender vegetables, adjust to your liking. Allow to sit after cycle is complete for 10-minutes and release pressure. Serve and enjoy! Note: Any vegetables can be used in this stew, these were the vegetables available at the time of creating the recipe. If you prefer other vegetables in your stew, simply change them! RECIPE NOTES
Maybe a half tsp to a tsp of corn starch to thicken up broth next time (or just a bit less water).
Was pretty good. I&rsquo;d say a 4 out of 5.
Here is the actual website for this recipe. Credit to Instant Pot:
description: Rustic bold stew loaded with beef stew meat, stew seasoning of your choice, and potatoes chopped, simmered until the kitchen fills with the most incredible aroma. Serve it with crusty bread and call it a perfect night.
title: Beef Stew

content:
Ingredients For Dry Rub
1 tbsp dry mustard 1 1/2 tbspsmoked paprika 1 tbsp onion powder 1/2 tspcayenne pepper 1 tsp cumin ground 1 tsp garlic powder 1 tbsp brown sugar 1 tsp black pepper ground 2 tsp salt For Ribs
2 racks baby back pork ribs (about 3 to 4 lbs) 4 cups apple juice 1/4 cup apple cider vinegar 2 tbspliquid smoke For BBQ Sauce
1/2 cup bbq sauce store bought 1/2 cup ketchup 1/4 cup whiskey 1/4 cup brown sugar 2 tbspWorcestershire sauce 1 tbspliquid smoke Instructions Prepare the dry rub by combining all the dry rub ingredients together in a small bowl. Remove the membrane from the back of the ribs with a paper towel. Season the baby back ribs with the dry rub generously on both sides. Place the ribs inside the Instant Pot, standing up and wrapping around theInstant Pot. Pour the apple juice, apple cider vinegar and liquid smoke inside the Instant pot, no need to stir. Close the lid (follow the manufacturer&rsquo;s guide for instructions on how to close the instant pot lid). Set theInstant Potto the Meat/Stew setting and set the timer to 20 minutes. Once theInstant Potcycle is complete, wait until the natural release cycle is complete, should take about 15 minutes. Follow the manufacturer&rsquo;s guide for quick release, if in a rush. Carefully unlock and remove the lid from the instant pot. While the ribs are cooking prepare the BBQ sauce. In a small saucepan add all the BBQ sauce ingredients and stir to combine. Simmer on low heat for about 20 to 25 minutes, the sauce should reduce a bit. Carefully remove the ribs from theInstant Potand place them onto a baking sheet. Brush them generously with the prepared BBQ sauce on both sides and place under the broiler for about 5 minutes. Keep the door to your oven open while broiling the ribs and keep an eye on them, because they could burn quickly. Serve with leftover BBQ sauce. Credit to Jo Cooks for this recipe. Here is a link to their webpage:
Instant Pot BBQ Pork Ribs - Jo CooksThese Instant Pot BBQ Pork …
description: Savory, golden robust pork with dry mustard and tbspsmoked paprika that's ridiculously easy to make and even more ridiculously delicious to eat.
title: BBQ Pork Ribs

content:
Ingredients INGREDIENTS
5 medium sized apples, peeled and chopped into chunks 2 tspcinnamon 1/2 tspnutmeg 1/2 cup water 1 tbspmaple syrup 4 tbsp butter 3/4 cup old fashioned rolled oats 1/4 cup flour 1/4 cupbrown sugar 1/2 tsp salt DIRECTIONS
Instructions Place apples on the bottom of yourInstant Pot. Sprinkle with cinnamon and nutmeg. Top with water and maple syrup. Melt the butter. In asmall bowl, mix together melted butter, oats, flour, brown sugar and salt. Drop by the spoonful on top of the apples. Secure the lid on the instant pot. Use the manual setting, and cook on high pressure for 8 minutes. Use a natural release. Let sit for a few minutes, the sauce will thicken. Serve warm and maybe top with vanilla ice cream. Servings: 3-4
Here is a link to the actual website. Credit to Centre Cut Cook:
Instant Pot Apple CrispThe EASIEST apple crisp ever!! Less than 15 minutes in your Instant Pot for this delicious classic dessert!
description: A gorgeous melt-in-your-mouth dessert with medium sized apples and tspcinnamon that looks like it came from a bakery but tastes even better because it came from your kitchen.
title: Apple Crisp

content:
Ingredients 1 lb(s) elbow macaroni Kosher salt 1 (12-oz) can evaporated milk 3 Tbsp unsalted butter 3 cups shredded mild or medium Cheddar Instructions Combine the macaroni, 4 cups water and 1 tablespoon salt in an Instant Pot® (see note). Follow the manufacturer&rsquo;s guide for locking the lid and preparing to cook. Set to pressure cook on high for 4 minutes.
After the pressure cook cycle is complete follow the manufacturer&rsquo;s guide for quick release and wait until the quick release cycle is complete. Careful of any remaining steam, unlock and remove the lid and switch to low saute setting.
Stir in the evaporated milk, butter and 1/4 cup water. Then add the Cheddar, a little at time, while constantly stirring, until the cheese is completely melted. Serve hot.
NOTES:
Seemed a bit dry and was sticking to bottom of the pot. Maybe try 4.5 cups of water instead of just 4? Was a bit gritty, too. A big container of it, leftovers, remained in the fridge, so this one isn&rsquo;t a home run. Maybe a 2.5 out of 5 her Here&rsquo;s a link to the actual website. Credit to Food Network:
5-Ingredient Instant Pot® Mac and Cheese Recipes | Food Network CanadaWe love multi-purpose kitchen gadgets that make life easier, so that&rsquo;s why the Instant Pot® (a slow cooker, pressure cooker and stove-top stand-in, all in one) is a go-to for quick meals. Especially this creamy kid-friendly mac and cheese, which cooks up in no time. And after it&rsquo;s been gobbled up, you&rsquo;ll only have one pot to clean!
description: Tender pasta tossed with elbow macaroni, kosher salt, and can evaporated milk in a bold sauce that coats every strand. This is the dinner everyone asks for twice in one week.
title: 5-Ingredient Mac 'n' Cheese

content: Ingredients 1 pack of beef 1 pack of pork 1/2 turkey breast or 1 chicken breast 1 can of beef consommé 1 can of water 1/2 medium onion 2 tbsp lard Bannock (double batch) Recipe here:Bannock (Yan&rsquo;s) Instructions Lard up the sides of the cast iron dutch oven. Cut meat into bite-sized cubes and toss that shit into the pot. Chop up the stupid onions into small enough pieces so you won&rsquo;t know it&rsquo;s there. Mix that devil&rsquo;s veggie witht he meat chunks. Salt and pepper that bitch, but keep in mind the consommé is salty, so don&rsquo;t overdo it. Throw in lard tbsps over top the meaty mix. Add in consommé and water. Should be covering meaty mix but just barely. Mix up the bannock dough and form a flat circle the size of the pot. It won&rsquo;t shrink or grow, so make it pretty close. Slap that doughy deliciousness over to the meaty mix, then cut some air vent slits into it. Just a few - no need to go full Dahmer on it. Splash a bit of water over the bannock so that it doesn&rsquo;t burn or get drier than a bucket of sand. Put it in the oven at 350 degrees for about 4 hours or so.
description: A beautiful melt-in-your-mouth pie with pack of beef and pack of pork with a buttery crust and a filling so good you'll want to eat it by the spoonful.
title: Seapie (Yan's)

content: Ingredients 1/2 an orange pepper 1/2 a red pepper 1/3 a yellow pepper 1 can of corn 1/4 cup of shredded cheese (optional) 2 cups crushed Sweet Chili Heat Doritos 2 Tbsp of mayonnaise Instructions Mix everything but the Doritos ahead of time. When you&rsquo;re ready to serve it, mix in the Doritos.
description: Rich, slow-simmered comforting chili with an orange pepper and a red pepper. Top it with cheese and sour cream and let the warmth spread from your belly outward.
title: Sweet Chili Heat Corn Salad (Sandra)

content:
Ingredients 4 red peppers Half a red onion 4 cloves of garlic 2 medium sized potatoes (yellow or white) A carton of vegetable broth Salt &amp; Pepper (to taste) Cayenne pepper (to taste) A gob of butter Instructions:
Instructions Turn on your oven broiler to high. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and spray with some cooking spray. Cut each pepper into fours and line on the baking sheet. Put in oven and let broil until skins start to turn black. Once skins have turned black, take out of oven and put into a large mixing bowl. Place plate on top of it to trap the heat in. This helps the skin soften so they are easy to remove. Let the peppers stay in the bowl for 10 minutes. While you wait, mince your onion and garlic. Wash and peel potatoes and cut them into cubes. Once 10 minutes have passed, carefully peel the skins off the peppers. Once the skin has been peeled off, chop up the peppers. In a large soup pot, melt butter at the bottom over medium heat. Combine your onion and garlic. Sauté for about 2 minutes, until the onions become soft. Add potatoes and combine for about another minute. Add in red peppers and stir everything together for about a minute. Season with salt and pepper. Empty carton of vegetable broth into the pot, stirring occasionally. Let soup simmer on low to medium heat, until potatoes are soft. Carefully sample the broth and add cayenne pepper if needed for an extra bit of spice. Carefully remove from stovetop and use immersion blender to bend sopu to a velvety texture.
description: A soul-warming bowl of savory soup with red peppers and half a red onion — the kind that simmers low and slow and makes the whole house smell incredible.
title: Sam's Roasted Red Pepper & Potato Soup

content:
Ingredients Dressing:
1/4 cup oil 1/4 cup vinegar 2 1/2 tbsp sugar 1/4 concentrated orange juice 2 cloves of garlic 1 tsp crushed red pepper 1/2 tsp basil Salt and pepper to taste Other stuff:
Whatever pasta you want crushed feta cheese grapes (red &amp; green) red and green peppers olives celery Instructions Mix all that stuff up. That&rsquo;s your dressing. Cook choice of pasta, drain, and add the dressing. Add the other stuff cut up however you want, however much you want, because I don&rsquo;t have these kinds of details. You can blame Heather if it tastes bad. She wrote down the initial recipe.
description: A bright, crisp fresh salad with vinegar and concentrated orange juice — fresh, colorful, and bursting with flavor. The side dish that steals the show.
title: Pasta Salad (Nandini)

content: Ingredients 1 (8 oz/250g) pkg cream cheese, softened 2 cloves of garlic, minced 2 tbsp dried oregano leaves 1 tsp (or less) of black pepper 2 cups cooked, diced chicken breast (about 2 5oz breasts) 1 cup finely sliced strips of seeded zucchini (about 1 small) 1/2 cup sun-dried tomatoes, reconstituted, thinly sliced 1/4 cup mayonnaise 1 1/2 tsp grated lemon peel (1/2 a lemon) 1/2 tsp red pepper flakes 1/4 tsp salt 1 Parisan bread (baguette?) Instructions Mix cream cheese, garlic, oregano, and black pepper together using an electric mixer until well blended. Set aside. In a separate bowl, stir remaining ingredients together, except the baguette, and set aside. Slice the baguette lengthwise from the side but not all the way through. Carefully scoop out bread from inside using a spoon. Completely coat inside of baguette with cream cheese mixture ensuring the edges are well covered, reserving 2 tablespoons of the mixture. Fill baguette evently with chicken mixture. Close baguette, using the reserved cream cheese mixture to coat the cut edges. Wrap very tightly with plastic wrap to keep baguette edges closed. Chill in the refrigerator for 12 hours or overnight. Before serving, unwrap baguette and cut 1&quot; wide slices with a serrated knife. Transfer slices to serving platter and add garnish.
description: Succulent hearty chicken with pkg cream cheese and cloves of garlic that's simple enough for a weeknight but impressive enough for company. Every. Single. Time.
title: Oregano, Sun-Dried Tomato, and Chicken Stuffed Baguette

content:
Ingredients 2 bell peppers (ideally red, but I had 1 green and 1 red) 3 roma tomatoes 2 red onions (barf) 2 scotch bonnet peppers 3 garlic cloves 1 tsp fresh ginger Half a cup water ⅔ cup vegetable oil 1 can tomato paste 1 tbsp curry powder 2 tsp dried thyme 3 chicken bouillon cubes Bay leaves 3 cups parboiled long grain rice Salt and pepper to taste (be generous) Instructions Roughly chop up bell peppers, tomatoes, 1 of the onions, scotch bonnet peppers, garlic and ginger. Throw that into a blender, add half a cup of water, and get it all liquidy.
Get your rage out and chop up the remaining onion into lil bits. If you cry, it’s just the lil bitch leaving your body in preparation for the scotch bonnet realness. Add the vegetable oil to the pot and let that warm up on medium heat, then add the onion you just diced. Cook that for 3 minutes.
Add the tomato paste and stir that in and let that cook for 5 minutes.
Add the blender contents into the pot and stir that up. Bring it to a simmer and then partially cover cuz this shit will splatter. Let that bubble for 15 minutes, stirring it now and then.
While waiting for that, it&rsquo;s a good time to rinse the rice. I rinsed it a bunch, and then let it drain over the sink.
Throw in the thyme, curry powder, bouillon cubes, bay leaves, and salt and pepper to taste. I didn’t measure the salt and pepper but it says “season generously”. Bring to a boil on medium-high heat.
Once the concoction is boiling, add the rinsed rice to it, bring it to a boil, immediately drop heat to medium-low. Cover the top of the pot with a sheet of aluminium foli and then cover it with the pot lid. Let it cook for 30 minutes. You don&rsquo;t have to stir it. Just let it do its thing.
After that 30 mins is up, take it off the heat and leave the foil and lid on. Let it steam for around 15 mins.
Give it a quick fluff and you&rsquo;re good to go.
Original recipe comes from Zena&rsquo;s Kitchen, but made WAAAAAY better by Yanner Bannaner with some pro …
description: Fluffy, fragrant robust rice with bell peppers and roma tomatoes — every grain perfectly cooked and packed with flavor. The side dish that steals the spotlight.
title: Jollof Rice (Yan's)

content:
Ingredients 1 1/2 cups of ground coconut 1/3 cup of shredded coconut 1 2/3 cups of powdered sugar 2 large egg whites (approx. 1/4 cup) 1 tsp salt 1 tbsp lemon juice 1/3 cup neutral oil (such as sunflower or canola) Instructions In a bowl, combine the finely ground coconut and powdered sugar.
Add the egg whites directly to the mixture. There is no need to whisk them beforehand. Mix until a soft, smooth dough forms.
Heat the oil until hot (not smoking).
Gradually pour the hot oil into the dough while mixing continuously, allowing the oil to fully absorb into the mixture.
Once the dough is uniform, add the salt and lemon juice. Mix briefly until well combined.
Fold in the shredded (unground) coconut to improve the texture of the cookies.
Let the dough rest at room temperature for 30 minutes. This resting time allows the coconut to absorb moisture and helps the dough firm up slightly, preventing the cookies from spreading too much during baking.
Transfer the dough to a piping bag. Pipe small round mounds onto a lined baking tray, leaving some space between them.
Bake in a preheated oven at 300°F (150°C) for about 20 minutes, or until the cookies are lightly golden on top.
description: Warm from the oven and loaded with of ground coconut, of shredded coconut, and of powdered sugar, these luscious cookies are the ones everyone reaches for first at the bake sale.
title: Coconut Cookies (Persian-Style) (Farang's)

content: Ingredients 5 lbs of lean hamburg 1 1/2 cans of tomato juice (48 oz) salt pork (small) chopped 3 heads of cabbage 3 cups long grain rice, cooked onions, salt and pepper Instructions Boil cabbage, peel leaves off, and core. Keep centre for top of cabbage rolls. Fry hamburg, onions, salt, and pepper in the oven at 350 degrees for a 1/2 hour untill cooked. Cut salt pork, while partially frozen, into small pieces. Fry on low about 20 mins. Cook rice separately. (Guess it&rsquo;s up to you to figure out how!) Mix rice, hamburg, and salt pork together gently. Line a roast pan with foil. Don&rsquo;t overstuff the cabbage leaves (about 1 to 1 1/2 tbsp of filling in each) Place cabbage rolls in the pan. Put a little bit of tomato juice over the first later. Layer 2 more times. Place leftover cabbage around outside of other rolls (so they won&rsquo;t burn). Pour tomato juice over all. Can put a few leaves on top of other rolls. Go around the edges with a knife to make sure there&rsquo;s enough juice. Add tomato juice during cooking if needed. Cover with foil and put cover on the roast pan. Cook 1 hour at 350 degrees, then 2 hours at 300 degrees.
description: Warm, homemade golden bread with of lean hamburg and of tomato juice — crusty on the outside, pillowy soft on the inside, and impossible to eat just one slice.
title: Cabbage Rolls (Gerry)

content: Ingredients 1 cup flour 2 tsp baking powder 2 tsp brown sugar 1 pinch of salt Water, as needed Instructions Mix ingredients into a bowl until mixed and a sticky dough forms. Can add a soupcon more flour to make it less sticky. But this is important, and I cannot stress this enough - DO NOT KNEAD. This is not bread. Do not overmix or spend too much time slapping this dough ball around, or the bannock will end up harder than Henry Cavill’s pectorals. Flatten out dough onto floured surface until its about a half-inch thick or so, then cut up into pieces. Don’t use rolling pin, use your hands like a peasant. Cut into whatever size pieces you think you’ll want. If you use larger pieces, you might need to make holes in the middle to allow it to properly cook through. Deep fry in some oil until golden brown for best results. Can also be baked in the oven, or wrapped around a bannock stick and cooked over a fire. Feel free to throw in extra bits to your liking, like throw in some blueberries if you want more desserty bannock, or jalapenos if you are feeling spicy.
description: Warm, homemade toasty bread with brown sugar and of salt — crusty on the outside, pillowy soft on the inside, and impossible to eat just one slice.
title: Bannock (Yan's)

content: Ingredients 1 cup white sugar 3 tbsp flour 3 cups sliced strawberries 3 cups diced rhubarb 1 1/2 cups flour 1 cup brown sugar 1 cup margarine 1 cup rolled oats Instructions Preheat oven to 375 degrees. In a large bowl, mix white sugar, 3 tbsp flour, strawberries, and rhubarb. Place mixture in a 9x13 pan. Mix 1 1/2 cups of flour, brown sugar, margarine, and oats till crumbly. Put crumble on top of rhubarb and strawberry mixture. Bake 45 mins in oven or until crisp and brown.
description: Tracey's spring-into-summer masterpiece — a thick, jammy layer of strawberries and rhubarb tucked beneath a buttery oat crumble that bakes up golden and crispy. Tart, sweet, and gone before it cools.
title: Rhubarb Strawberry Cake (Tracey)

content:
Ingredients 3 cups white vinegar 1 1/2 cups of water 1 1/2 tsp salt Optional:
I like to jazz mine up a bit more so I put in:
A couple of cloves of garlic in each jar A few sprigs of dill A shake of crushed red pepper Instructions Put all ingredients in a bot and boil for 10 minutes. Let this solution cool completely. Hard cook a dozen eggs (this solution will easily do 2 dozen eggs). Peel &rsquo;em and pack em into quart jars. Pour the cold vinegar solution in the jars, then seal. Let stand 2 days before crushing these delicious friggers.
description: Mom's version comes with a little attitude — classic pickled eggs jazzed up with garlic cloves, fresh dill sprigs, and a shake of crushed red pepper for a slow, sneaky heat. The jar that never lasts as long as you think it will.
title: Pickled Eggs (Mom's)

content: Ingredients 2 Tbsp butter 2 Bags of white chocolate chips (225g each) 1 Bag white mini marshmallows (400g) 1 1/2 cups chopped baking gumdrops (350g of jujubes) Instructions Make large double boiler with pot and over proof bowl. Over simmered water melt butter, chocolate chips, and marshmallows. Stir in gumdrops. Transfer to oval baking dish lined with parchment paper. Pat down. If too sticky use sprayed parchment. Leave in fridge overnight. Cut next day.
description: Tracey's no-bake holiday showstopper — creamy white chocolate and melted marshmallows folded around chewy baking gumdrops, pressed into a log, and sliced into jewel-studded rounds. Like biting into a sweet, pillowy cloud full of candy surprises.
title: Nougat Candy (Tracey)

content: Ingredients 1/2 cup melted butter 1 cup brown sugar 1 loaf of Texas toast (no crusts) 4 eggs 1 1/2 cups of milk 1 tsp vanilla Instructions Melt butter in microwave. Add sugar, stir and pour into a 9 x 13 dish. Spread all over the bottom. Beat eggs, milk, and vanilla. Place layer of toast, then remaining egg mixture on top. Cover and chill overnight. Sprinkle with cinnamon. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.
description: Tracey's genius make-ahead breakfast — thick slices of Texas toast nestled in buttery brown sugar, soaked in a vanilla custard, and baked until caramelized and puffy. The kind of morning that makes everyone come downstairs twice.
title: French Toast Bake (Tracey)

content:
Ingredients Mix together all of the following:
1 Lemon Cake Mix 1 Pkg. Lemon Instant Pudding 1 Cup of Water 1/2 Cup of Oil 4 Eggs Topping:
2 Tbsp of cinnamon 1/2 Cup of Brown Sugar 1/2 Cup of Chopped Walnuts (Optional) (Billy&rsquo;s Note: They&rsquo;re gross - don&rsquo;t do it!) Directions:
Instructions Grease 2 regular loaf pans. Sprinkle 1/2 of the topping mixture on bottom of the pans. Pour half of the cake mixture next. Add the rest of the topping mixture. Pour the rest of the batter on top. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 50 minutes.
description: Pep's Grandma knew what she was doing — a bright, citrusy cake made with lemon cake mix and instant pudding, topped with a cinnamon-sugar crumble that shatters with every bite. The recipe everyone asks for but she only shared with family.
title: Lemon Coffee Cake - Pep's Grandma

content:
Ingredients Flour Ingredients (#1)
1 (450g) container of cottage cheese 4 Tbsp melted butter 2 Tsp salt 2 Eggs 1 Cup water 2 Tsp sugar Wet Ingredients (#2)
4 Tsp active dry yeast 4 Tbsp dried onions 4 Tsp dill seed 5 Cups flour Instructions Put cottage cheese in bowl. Add eggs and hot water. Whisk together. Add salt and sugar. Whisk warm mixture on stove stirring constantly until it is lukewarm. Add the melted butter after it is done heating up. Use your hands to mix in flour ingredients (#2) to wet ingredients (#1). Dump out on floured board. Knead dough using a little bit of flour as needed. When you see it cracking on top, that&rsquo;s enough kneading!! Grease a bowl, put the dough in it, and then turn if over (the bowl or the dough? Not sure&hellip;lemme know if you make this and I&rsquo;ll update the recipe) Cover with a tea towel and the put a black garbage bag on top of the tea towel. Let rise for about 1 hour. Roll into balls. Cover a cookie sheet with parchment paper and put your balls on the sheet. giggle Cover with the tea towel and garbage bag and let them rise for about 1 hour. Bake at 400 degrees for 20 minutes.
description: Pillowy homemade buns loaded with cottage cheese and flecked with fragrant dill — these no-knead beauties rise tall, bake golden, and fill the kitchen with the most incredible aroma. A family recipe from J.M. and Linda that's earned its place at every holiday table.
title: Dilly Casserole Buns (J.M./Linda)

content: CLASSIC PICKLED EGGS Ingredients 12small eggs 3 cupswhite vinegar ¼ cupwhite sugar 1 Tbspsalt 2 clovesgarlic Cut up white onions(optional) Ingredients 1 bay leaf(optional) Instructions Instructions Prepare the eggs:Place eggs in a saucepan and cover with water. Bring to a boil, remove from heat, and let eggs stand in hot water for 15 minutes. Remove eggs from hot water, cool under cold running water, and peel. Make the brine:Bring vinegar, sugar, and salt to a boil until sugar is dissolved. Remove from heat. Jar and refrigerate:Place peeled eggs, garlic, onions, and bay leaf in a 1 quart mason jar; top with the vinegar mixture. Seal the jar and refrigerate for at least 1 week before serving.
description: Colette's famous pickled eggs — tender hard-boiled eggs steeped in a tangy vinegar brine with garlic and a whisper of sugar, until they're briny, snappy, and completely addictive. A party tray classic that disappears first.
title: Classic Pickled Eggs (Colette's)

content:
Ingredients 2 lbs. Boneless Skinless Chicken Thighs (approximately 4 thighs) 2 large Eggs 2/3 cup All Purpose Flour 2/3 cup Cornstarch 1 cup Panko Breadcrumbs 1 teaspoon Paprika 1 teaspoon Salt 1/2 teaspoon Pepper 1/2 tablespoon Garlic Powder 1/2 tablespoon Onion Powder Instructions In a large bowl, mix flour, cornstarch, and spices together. In a separate small bowl, whisk eggs. In a third bowl large enough to dip a whole chicken thigh, pour in the Panko bread crumbs. Coat a piece of chicken in flour mixture, then dredge in the egg wash, and finish coating it with the panko crumbs. Place on a clean solid surface, such as a plate or cutting board. Repeat for each piece of chicken. Pre-heat the air fryer to 350 degrees F. (1-2 minutes depending on your air fryer model). Spray your air fryer basked and chicken thighs with olive oil spray. The main reason for nonstick cooking spray is it will help the chicken thighs crisp up more and keep them from sticking to the basket. Working in batches, place the thighs in the air fryer basket in a single layer. Air fry the chicken on 350F for 12 minutes. Use tongs to flip chicken and air fry for another 3-5 minutes to make sure all sides of the chicken are nice and crisp. Check the chicken with a meat thermometer to make sure the internal temperature reaches 165F. Credit for this recipe goes to TopRockin.com:
Air Fryer Panko Chicken Thighs | Trop RockinAir fried to a crisp perfection, this Air Fryer Panko Chicken Thighs recipe is so easy and tasty. We&rsquo;re talking juicy, tender panko-breaded chicken thighs brushed with a sweet honey glaze, ready and on the table in under a half hour. These crispy chicken thighs can&rsquo;t be beat.
description: Thick, juicy chicken thighs triple-coated in seasoned flour, egg wash, and crispy panko breadcrumbs, then air fried to a deep golden crunch. All the satisfaction of fried chicken without the deep fryer.
title: Air Fryer Panko Chicken Thighs

content:
Ingredients 5-6 boneless skinless chicken thighs patted dry 1 teaspoon garlic powder 1 teaspoon smoked paprika 1/2 teaspoon oregano 1/2 teaspoon salt 1/4 teaspoon black pepper Instructions Pat chicken thighs dry with a paper towel, then transfer to a bowl. Combine all the seasonings together in a bowl, then pour them into the bowl with the chicken and use your hands to coat the chicken with the spices. Preheat your air fryer to 380° (mine took 3 minutes to preheat). Then, place chicken smooth side down into the air fryer, spray with nonstick spray/olive oil spray, and cook at 380° for 12 minutes. NOTE: every air fryer is different, so cook times may vary. Once the air fryer beeps, use kitchen tongs to flip the chicken over, and cook for an additional 6-8 minutes on the second side, or until chicken is cooked through. (Billy&rsquo;s note: I only put them in for 4 additional mins instead of 6-8. I think they&rsquo;d have been too dry with that, so gauge them when you flip them.) Credit for this recipe to goes to The Almond Eater:
Air Fryer Chicken ThighsEasy Air Fryer Chicken Thighs are crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside, and ready in under 25 minutes!
description: Juicy boneless chicken thighs rubbed with smoked paprika, garlic, and oregano, then air fried until the outside is beautifully golden and crispy while the inside stays tender and succulent. Ready in under 25 minutes.
title: Air Fryer Chicken Thighs

content:
Ingredients 2 cups mashed potatoes (preferably made with butter and cream) 1 cup shredded cheddar cheese 1/2 cup all-purpose flour 1 large egg 1 cup panko breadcrumbs Salt and pepper to taste 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder (optional) 1/2 teaspoon onion powder (optional) Olive oil spray (or any cooking spray) Instructions Prepare the Mashed Potatoes:If you haven’t already, prepare mashed potatoes. Ensure they are smooth and slightly on the thicker side (not too runny). Mix the Ingredients:In a large bowl, combine the mashed potatoes, shredded cheddar cheese, salt, pepper, garlic powder, and onion powder (if using). Stir until the cheese is evenly distributed. Form the Balls:Scoop about 1 tablespoon of the mashed potato mixture and roll it into a ball. Continue until all the mixture is used. You should be able to form 12–16 balls, depending on their size. Coat the Balls:Set up a breading station:In one shallow dish, place the flour.In another dish, beat the egg.In a third dish, add the panko breadcrumbs.Roll each mashed potato ball first in the flour, then dip in the egg, and finally coat it in the panko breadcrumbs. Press gently to ensure the breadcrumbs stick well. Preheat the Air Fryer:Preheat your air fryer to 375°F (190°C) for about 3-5 minutes. Air Fry the Mashed Potato Balls:Lightly spray the air fryer basket with olive oil.Place the potato balls in the air fryer basket, leaving some space between them for air circulation.Lightly spray the tops of the balls with more olive oil.Air fry at 375°F for 8-10 minutes or until they are golden brown and crispy, flipping them halfway through the cooking time for even crispiness. Serve:Once golden and crispy, remove the mashed potato balls from the air fryer. Let them cool slightly before serving.You can serve these with a dipping sauce, such as sour cream, ranch, or ketchup! Tips:
If the mashed potatoes are too soft and difficult to roll, refrigerate the mixture for about 30 minutes to firm it up. You can also add some …
description: Creamy cheddar-stuffed mashed potato balls rolled in panko breadcrumbs and air fried to a perfect golden crunch. Crispy on the outside, warm and cheesy on the inside — the ultimate comfort food appetizer.
title: Air Fryer Mashed Potato Balls
